note_families.title: Description of the Business
note_families.summary: SPV structure, securitization entities, business purpose, unit counts (6,207 in 2024), franchise/license terminology note

note_families.title: Summary of Significant Accounting Policies
note_families.summary: Basis of presentation, estimates, fiscal year (53rd week $12.8M), restricted cash, accounts receivable, fair value, franchise operations, revenue recognition (ASC 606), contract liabilities, income taxes

note_families.title: Member's Equity
note_families.summary: Single class LLC interest, cash and non-cash distributions, franchise agreement transfer mechanics between Franchise Holder and Company

note_families.title: Related Party Transactions
note_families.summary: Management agreement with TBC (no expenses allocated), master franchise agreements with TBC/TBA (25-year, $63.5M affiliate royalties), due to affiliates ($0.6M incentive reimbursements)

note_families.title: Guarantees and Other Commitments/Contingencies
note_families.summary: Securitization notes ($3.74B, 5 tranches), collateral structure, covenant requirements, DSCR thresholds, rapid amortization events, restricted cash requirements

note_families.title: Subsequent Events
note_families.summary: Evaluated through March 26, 2025. No items requiring disclosure.

upfront_fees.rationale: Services are interrelated with franchise right, not individually distinct

types: Cash payments for new unit openings
franchise_incentives.accounting: Capitalized as Franchise incentives, amortized as reduction in Franchise and license fees over expected cash flow period

securitization_structure.guarantee_type: Joint and several, secured by substantially all assets
collateral: All existing/future US Taco Bell franchise and license agreements and royalties
securitization_structure.cash_flow_mechanics: All franchise cash deposited to Issuer account → trustee cash accounts → note payments → excess to TBC

parent_affiliate_structure.due_to_affiliates_2024: $0.6M (reimbursement of incentive payments made by Manager)
parent_affiliate_structure.management_fee: Paid by Issuer, not Company — no allocation to Company

tax_structure.entity_type: Single member LLC, disregarded for tax purposes
